signals: REUTERS: Unprecedented escalation in the Persian Gulf as US and Iranian naval assets engage in standoff.
BRENT CRUDE: Pre-market futures indicating massive volatility, breaking $85/barrel.
MARINE TRAFFIC (AIS): Total freeze on tanker movements entering or exiting the Strait of Hormuz pending military de-escalation.
GLOBAL INTEL: Analysts predicting prolonged disruption, SPR releases being discussed globally.
